questions.text: Newton's first law of motion is also known as:
questions.explanation: Newton's first law states that an object remains at rest or in uniform motion unless acted upon by external force. This is the law of inertia.

questions.text: Force is equal to the rate of change of momentum.
questions.explanation: Newton's second law: F = dp/dt = ma. Force equals the rate of change of momentum.

questions.text: The SI unit of force is ________.
questions.explanation: The SI unit of force is Newton (N). 1 N = 1 kg·m/s²

questions.text: State Newton's third law of motion.
questions.correctAnswer: For every action, there is an equal and opposite reaction.
questions.explanation: Newton's third law: To every action, there is always an equal and opposite reaction. Forces always occur in pairs.
